# CGFontPostScriptFormat.type3

**Case**

A Type 3 PostScript format.

## Declaration

```swift
case type3
```

## Description

This is documented in *PostScript Language Reference, 3rd edition*, which is available from [http://partners.adobe.com/].

## Constants

- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type1**: A Type 1 font format.
- **CGFontPostScriptFormat.type42**: A constant representing a Type 42 font format.

items.description: A constant representing a Type 42 font format.
